testcase.name: test_correct_credentials_login

failure.message:
assert 'password_hash' not in '{"session_t...ange":false}'
'password_hash' is contained here: {"session_token":"password_5322a47326274bfcb989e7dc3f14749fe61a591d51c944dd8c5a9c012d91fd08","user":{"user_id":"user_c9df10e0343f","email":"test_iter47_admin_07d4097f@example.com","phone":null,"name":"test_iter47_admin_07d4097f@example.com","picture":null,"role":"company_admin","company_id":"cmp_957cf1140e","department":null,"position":null,"employee_code":null,"father_name":null,"dob":null,"doj":null,"shift_start":null,"shift_end":null,"salary_monthly":null,"half_day_hrs":null,"full_day_hrs":null,"onboarded":true,"created_at":"2026-07-04T04:15:43...
...Full output truncated (2 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_no_hash_in_login_body

failure.message:
